message:
test(cancel): Property-based cancellation protocol invariants (591 lines)

New proptest suite covering the multi-phase cancellation protocol's
algebraic and state-machine properties:

CancelKind severity:
- Total order, reflexivity, transitivity across all 10 variants
- Ord/PartialOrd consistency with severity() values
- Bounded severity range [0..=9]

CancelReason::strengthen:
- Monotone (severity never decreases)
- Yields max of two inputs
- Idempotent on equal-severity inputs
- Shutdown dominates all, User is weakest

CancelPhase state machine:
- Rank monotonicity across Requested→Cancelling→Finalizing→Completed
- Regression rejection (higher→lower rank invalid)

CancelWitness validation:
- Valid monotone transitions accepted
- Phase regression, severity weakening, epoch mismatch all rejected
- First witness (no prior) always accepted

Cx integration:
- checkpoint() returns Err when cancelled + unmasked
- checkpoint() returns Ok when cancel-masked
- cancel reason stored correctly

Cleanup budget:
- Inversely proportional to severity (less severe = more generous)
- Always non-zero poll quota (bounded cleanup guarantee)
- Priority >= 200 (cancel lane)

Includes InvariantTracker-based coverage summary test asserting 100%
invariant coverage across all 26 checked properties.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
